title: crocus × hybridus
intro: Crocus × hybridus, also known as the garden crocus, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between Crocus cartwrightianus and Crocus reticulatus, and is prized for its vibrant flowers in shades of purple, yellow, and white. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its glycosides, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crocus × hybridus include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant protection, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Crocus × hybridus are typically made by drying the flowers and using them in teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia.
